block.text: You have chosen a versatile but powerful humanoid robot, a Trouper XI. This is the standard Thalian combat robot. It has two forms: it can shape itsélf into a giant metal warrior, or into a sleek combat plane. TROOPER Human Form ARMOUR 12 SPEED Medium COMBAT BONUS +2 Plane Form ARMOUR 10 spEEDVeryFast COMBAT BON VS +2 SPECIAL ABtLITIES: In human form, the Trooper XI carries a gun in one hand and a shield in the other. On an Attack Strength roll Of 18 or better, even if the enemy hits it, the robot gets the shield in the way and takes no damage. In plane form, the robot has no special combat abilities.
